creator: ghislain.potier@gpotier.org
text:
I build with poudriere tools vlc with qt5 option

1/ ports are up
2/ building vlc depend qt5-*


Problems have been encountered with the following packages:

[00:00:08] Failed ports: 
misc/qt5-examples:fetch 
devel/qt5-qdoc-data:fetch 
devel/qt5-qmake:fetch

I put the error logs for these packages below.

For qt5-qmake

=>> Building devel/qt5-qmake

I read from https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/blob/main/devel/qt5-qmake/distinfo

TIMESTAMP = 1696915486
SHA256 (KDE/Qt/5.15.11/kde-qtbase-5.15.11p135.tar.xz) = 1cc7c8e5bc326a5d69e339fdceade191fdd6a94423c82514e24a00ca134014f4
SIZE (KDE/Qt/5.15.11/kde-qtbase-5.15.11p135.tar.xz) = 50365656

I think there's a control problem somewhere at version level.

If you need more information, let me know.

Sincerely.
